title: JSON Diff
description: Structural diff of two JSON docs — ignores key order, highlights added/removed/changed. Fully local.

notice.title: Structural diff, key order ignored
notice.body: Recurses by key and diffs arrays by index; type changes are flagged too. Runs entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

result.title: Differences
result.identical: The two JSON documents are identical
result.waiting: Enter valid JSON on both sides to see the differences
